label: About
title: About The Rose-Fog Listening Procession
short_blurb: Built from 137 recent saved-content signals, 12 inspected links, and 9 unique source objects.
body: For the visual seed, the process used to be expected, by PINKCOURTESYPHONE (f4.bcbits.com), then translated that source image into diffuse coral light through layered scrims, cool blue-green fog at floor level, small amber glows inside each carried object and materials like salmon-pink translucent gauze, frosted acrylic, smoked glass, brushed aluminum, and lacquered black wood. The de-duplicated source set was then bound to to be expected, by PINKCOURTESYPHONE, Air / Earth, by Celia Hollander, and lucid landscape, by UNIT KAI.

gpt-5.5 inspected the finished plate and mapped 9 visible objects, including large rose translucent scrim wall, left black speaker column face, glowing frosted cylindrical veil, and brass wall mailbox plaque. The run wrote the package, masks, interpretation, and enhancement plan at tmp/daily-process-runs/daily-process-2026-04-26T14-50-08-398Z.
